name: Stateful Deep Research
description: A high-performance deep research tool with hierarchical memory, adaptive compression, and conflict resolution.

searchResults.description: Web search results (JSON or text) from MCP web_search for the initial query

followUps.description: JSON array of follow-up search results, each with query and searchResults fields. Used in round-2+ of multi-round research.

urls.description: Array of URLs to fetch full content for (two-phase summary-first search flow)

searchAngles.description: JSON array of search angles generated during query clarification. Each angle is used to run a separate get-web-search-summaries query.

input.hint: Maximum number of sources to process
Number of search angles to generate during query clarification

examples.prompt: Use the stateful-deep-research skill to produce a research report for: 'What are the latest trends in renewable energy storage?'
examples.call: {"researchQuery": "What are the latest trends in renewable energy storage?"}

examples.prompt: Use the stateful-deep-research skill to produce a research report for: 'What are the current best warehouse management systems?' The skill will generate search angles, perform multi-angle searches, and then synthesize findings into a report.
examples.call: {"researchQuery": "What are the current best warehouse management systems?"}

examples.prompt: Use the stateful-deep-research skill with pre-collected search results: 'What are the latest trends in renewable energy storage?' Results from web search: [{"title":"Energy Storage Review","url":"https://example.com","snippet":"LFP batteries now account for 90% of grid storage deployments"}]
examples.call: {"researchQuery": "What are the latest trends in renewable energy storage?", "searchResults": "[{\"title\": \"Energy Storage Review\", \"url\": \"https://example.com\", \"snippet\": \"LFP batteries now account for 90% of grid storage deployments\"}]"

examples.prompt: Use the stateful-deep-research skill with follow-up search results for continued deep research on renewable energy storage trends.
examples.call: {"researchQuery": "Latest trends in renewable energy storage", "followUps": "[{\"query\": \"sodium-ion battery developments 2026\", \"searchResults\": \"...\"}]"
